info.title: Hindclaw API
info.description: Access control API for Hindsight memory server

get.description: List API keys for a user. Keys are masked after creation.

Return the caller's own profile including channels.

Args:
    _auth: Authenticated principal (user only, SA rejected).

Returns:
    MeProfileResponse with user record and channel list.

List the caller's own API keys (masked).

Args:
    _auth: Authenticated principal (user only, SA rejected).

Returns:
    List of ApiKeyResponse with masked key prefixes.

post.description:
Create a new API key for the caller.

Args:
    req: CreateApiKeyRequest with optional description.
    _auth: Authenticated principal (user only, SA rejected).

Returns:
    ApiKeyCreateResponse with full api_key shown once.

delete.description:
Delete one of the caller's own API keys.

Scoped to the caller's user_id — cannot delete other users' keys.

Args:
    key_id: API key record ID.
    _auth: Authenticated principal (user only, SA rejected).

get.description:
List the caller's personal template sources.

Scoped to the caller's user_id — only returns sources with
scope='personal' owned by the authenticated principal.

Args:
    _auth: Authenticated principal (users and SAs allowed).

Returns:
    List of SourceResponse for the caller's personal sources.

post.description:
Register a personal template source for the caller.

Source is created with scope='personal' and owner set to the
caller's user_id. Name is derived from the URL unless an alias
is provided.

Args:
    request: CreateSourceRequest with url and optional alias/auth_token.
    _auth: Authenticated principal (users and SAs allowed).

Returns:
    SourceResponse for the newly created personal source.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 422 if the source name cannot be derived from the URL.
    HTTPException: 409 if a personal source with that name already exists.

delete.description:
Remove a personal template source owned by the caller.

Only deletes sources with scope='personal' that belong to the
caller — cannot affect other users' sources or server-scope sources.

Args:
    name: Template source name to delete.
    _auth: Authenticated principal (users and SAs allowed).

Raises:
    HTTPException: 404 if the source is not found in the caller's
        personal sources.

get.description: Resolve and return effective access policy + bank policy for a context.

post.summary: Install a marketplace template into the personal scope
Re-fetch an installed personal template from its source

get.summary: Check whether the source has a newer revision

post.summary: Install a marketplace template into the server scope
Re-fetch an installed server-scope template from its source

get.summary: Check whether the source has a newer revision

post.summary: Apply an installed template to a new or existing bank

ApiKeyCreateResponse.title: ApiKeyCreateResponse
ApiKeyCreateResponse.description: API key at creation time — full key shown once.

ApiKeyResponse.title: ApiKeyResponse
ApiKeyResponse.description: API key in list view — key is masked after creation.

BankCreationResponse.title: BankCreationResponse
BankCreationResponse.description:
Response from POST /ext/hindclaw/banks — bank creation from template.

Wraps upstream's ``BankTemplateImportResponse`` so clients see the
same counts/errors upstream reports directly.

retain_mission.title: Retain Mission
retain_mission.description: Steers what gets extracted during retain

retain_chunk_size.title: Retain Chunk Size
retain_chunk_size.description: Max token size for each content chunk

entities_allow_free_form.title: Entities Allow Free Form
entities_allow_free_form.description: Allow entities outside the label vocabulary

BankTemplateConfig.title: BankTemplateConfig
BankTemplateConfig.description:
Bank configuration fields within a template manifest.

Only includes configurable (per-bank) fields. Credential fields
(API keys, base URLs) are intentionally excluded for security.

name.title: Name
name.description: Human-readable name for the directive (used as match key on re-import)

content.title: Content
content.description: The directive text to inject into prompts

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Higher priority directives are injected first

BankTemplateDirective.title: BankTemplateDirective
BankTemplateDirective.description:
A directive definition within a bank template manifest.

Directives are matched by name on re-import: existing directives
with the same name are updated, new ones are created.

mental_models_created.title: Mental Models Created
mental_models_created.description: IDs of newly created mental models

operation_ids.title: Operation Ids
operation_ids.description: Operation IDs for mental model content generation (async)

dry_run.title: Dry Run
dry_run.description: True if this was a validation-only run

BankTemplateImportResponse.title: BankTemplateImportResponse
BankTemplateImportResponse.description: Response model for the bank template import endpoint.

bank.description: Bank configuration to apply. Omit to leave config unchanged.

mental_models.title: Mental Models
mental_models.description: Mental models to create or update (matched by id). Omit to leave unchanged.

directives.title: Directives
directives.description: Directives to create or update (matched by name). Omit to leave unchanged.

BankTemplateManifest.title: BankTemplateManifest
BankTemplateManifest.description:
A bank template manifest for import/export.

Version field enables forward-compatible schema evolution: the API
auto-upgrades older manifest versions to the current schema on import.

bank.reflect_mission: You are helping a support agent remember customer interactions.
bank.retain_mission: Extract customer issues, resolutions, and sentiment.

directives.content: Always respond with empathy and understanding.
directives.name: Always be empathetic

mental_models.name: Customer Sentiment Overview
mental_models.source_query: What is the overall sentiment trend?

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique ID for the mental model (alphanumeric lowercase with hyphens)

name.title: Name
name.description: Human-readable name for the mental model

source_query.title: Source Query
source_query.description: The query to run to generate content

BankTemplateMentalModel.title: BankTemplateMentalModel
BankTemplateMentalModel.description: A mental model definition within a bank template manifest.

ChannelResponse.title: ChannelResponse
ChannelResponse.description: Channel mapping returned by GET/POST endpoints.

CreatePolicyAttachmentRequest.title: CreatePolicyAttachmentRequest
CreatePolicyAttachmentRequest.description: Request to attach a policy to a principal.

CreatePolicyRequest.title: CreatePolicyRequest
CreatePolicyRequest.description: Request to create an access policy.

CreateSAKeyRequest.title: CreateSAKeyRequest
CreateSAKeyRequest.description: Request to create an SA API key.

CreateSelfServiceAccountRequest.title: CreateSelfServiceAccountRequest
CreateSelfServiceAccountRequest.description: Self-service SA creation — owner is always the authenticated caller.

CreateServiceAccountRequest.title: CreateServiceAccountRequest
CreateServiceAccountRequest.description: Request to create a service account.

CreateSourceRequest.title: CreateSourceRequest
CreateSourceRequest.description: Request to register a marketplace source.

CreateTemplateRequest.title: CreateTemplateRequest
CreateTemplateRequest.description: Request to create a personal template by inlining an upstream manifest.

InstallTemplateRequest.title: InstallTemplateRequest
InstallTemplateRequest.description:
Request to install a template from a marketplace source.

The ``{id}`` in the URL path is the template id WITHIN the source.
The installed-template id is ``alias_id`` if provided, else the source
template id. This lets a user install the same source template under a
different installed name (Section 4.3 identity invariant: at most one
row per (id, scope, owner)).

MeProfileResponse.title: MeProfileResponse
MeProfileResponse.description: Response for GET /me — caller's own profile.

refresh_after_consolidation.title: Refresh After Consolidation
refresh_after_consolidation.description: If true, refresh this mental model after observations consolidation (real-time mode)

fact_types.title: Fact Types
fact_types.description: Filter which fact types are retrieved during reflect. None means all types (world, experience, observation).

exclude_mental_models.title: Exclude Mental Models
exclude_mental_models.description: If true, exclude all mental models from the reflect loop (skip search_mental_models tool).

exclude_mental_model_ids.title: Exclude Mental Model Ids
exclude_mental_model_ids.description: Exclude specific mental models by ID from the reflect loop.

tags_match.title: Tags Match
tags_match.description: Override how the model's tags filter memories during refresh. If not set, defaults to 'all_strict' when the model has tags (security isolation) or 'any' when the model has no tags. Set to 'any' to include untagged memories alongside tagged ones during refresh.

tag_groups.title: Tag Groups
tag_groups.description: Compound boolean tag expressions to use during refresh instead of the model's own tags. When set, these tag groups are passed to reflect and the model's flat tags are NOT used for filtering. Supports nested and/or/not expressions for complex tag-based scoping.

MentalModelTrigger.title: MentalModelTrigger
MentalModelTrigger.description: Trigger settings for a mental model.

PatchTemplateRequest.title: PatchTemplateRequest
PatchTemplateRequest.description: Partial update for hand-edited templates. Every field is optional.

SAKeyCreateResponse.title: SAKeyCreateResponse
SAKeyCreateResponse.description: SA API key at creation time — full key shown once.

SAKeyResponse.title: SAKeyResponse
SAKeyResponse.description: SA API key in list view — key is masked.

SourceResponse.title: SourceResponse
SourceResponse.description: Response for a registered marketplace source.

TagGroupAnd.title: TagGroupAnd
TagGroupAnd.description: Compound AND group: all child filters must match.

TagGroupLeaf.title: TagGroupLeaf
TagGroupLeaf.description: A leaf tag filter: matches memories by tag list and match mode.

TagGroupNot.title: TagGroupNot
TagGroupNot.description: Compound NOT group: child filter must NOT match.

TagGroupOr.title: TagGroupOr
TagGroupOr.description: Compound OR group: at least one child filter must match.

TemplateResponse.title: TemplateResponse
TemplateResponse.description: Installed template, surfaced over the API.

UpdatePolicyRequest.title: UpdatePolicyRequest
UpdatePolicyRequest.description: Request to update an access policy.

UpdateSelfServiceAccountRequest.title: UpdateSelfServiceAccountRequest
UpdateSelfServiceAccountRequest.description:
Self-service SA update — only display_name is mutable.

Scoping policy and activation state are admin-only operations.
An SA authenticates as its owner, so without this restriction an SA
could remove its own scoping policy and escalate to the parent user's
full permissions.

UpdateServiceAccountRequest.title: UpdateServiceAccountRequest
UpdateServiceAccountRequest.description: Request to update a service account.

UpsertBankPolicyRequest.title: UpsertBankPolicyRequest
UpsertBankPolicyRequest.description: Request to create/update a bank policy.

UserResponse.title: UserResponse
UserResponse.description: User resource returned by GET/POST/PUT endpoints.
